name: Neck hurts after work fall but no doctor yet, what in Utah?

mainEntity.name: Neck hurts after work fall but no doctor yet, what in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: See authorized doctor ASAP; delays hurt causation proof.[1] Key factors: (1) Within 180 days notice; (2) Untreated injuries weaken claims; (3) Emergency ok if urgent. Treat now. Starts benefits clock.
